prestazioni: AGU 1.8T engine (engine code: AGU) upgraded with a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3-inch downpipe featuring a Bellmouth design and a 200-cell catalytic converter from Milltek Sport for optimized exhaust flow and reduced backpressure.

Forged internals from Mahle Motorsport including 83mm forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), H-beam connecting rods from Eagle Specialty Products, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance, all balanced to 2 grams and paired with ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs and main studs for 400+ hp reliability.

Custom ECU remapping via APR Stage 3+ software (specific to AGU engine with K04 hybrid turbo compatibility) utilizing a Cobb Accessport V3 for real-time monitoring, with a custom ethanol fueling system from Fuel-It! (E85 compatible) including a 1000cc/min port-injection kit and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Oettinger WBX kit (specific to 8L chassis) with custom front fenders extended by 30mm and rear quarter panels extended by 40mm, paired with a custom vented hood from Maxton Design featuring dual NACA ducts for AGU intercooler cooling.

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (8L-specific valving) with adjustable camber plates from H&R and spherical bearing top mounts from 034 Motorsport, paired with polybushings from SuperPro (part numbers SPF1105K and SPF1106K) for precise suspension geometry and reduced compliance.

Full aero package from JE Design including a GT-style front splitter (8L-specific mounting points), a carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated tow hook cover, and a custom 100mm rear spoiler extension (adjustable angle) for high-speed stability, finished in Audi Nogaro Blue (LY7W) with matte clear coat.
